task: Productize the completed offline auto-trading MVP with docs, examples, and tests using ultragoal plus team.
principles: Preserve offline-only safety above feature expansion.
Prefer documentation, deterministic examples, and tests over speculative trading features.
Make every user-facing claim verifiable by local commands.
decision_drivers: User asked to do all useful next work now.
Current MVP is complete but lacks onboarding artifacts.
Live/paper trading remains high-risk and out of scope without a separate approval gate.

options.name: Productization docs/examples/tests
cons: Does not add real trading connectivity

options.name: Start paper/live trading adapter
options.reason: Conflicts with current MVP safety boundary and requires separate broker/legal/credential planning.

options.name: Add dependency-heavy analytics/dashboard
options.reason: Premature; adds dependencies and maintenance before basic onboarding is complete.

adr.decision: Add README, examples, sample reports, future-live-gate docs, and regression tests; do not add broker/network/live features.
consequences: Repo becomes runnable and reviewable by a new user
Future trading work remains explicitly gated

ralplan_architect_review.evidence: Architect re-review approved deterministic sample-report comparison, docs safety coverage beyond README, and pending critic gate discipline.

ralplan_critic_review.evidence: Critic approved principle/option consistency, alternatives, risk mitigation, acceptance criteria, and verification plan.
